_comment: STARTER CARDS - Faction selection screen ship previews. Loaded by CardBuilder.java -> StarterCard.java. Fields: faction, shipTexture (preview image asset), connectedShipCardGuid (the actual Ship card given to new players), firePower/toughNess/speed/electronicWarfare (1-5 preview stat bars shown in faction select UI). One per faction (Colonial + Cylon).
